title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Britannia Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
